text.headline: The Second Intifada
text.text: Israeli police clash with Palestinians near Lion Gate in Jerusalem's Old City on October 06, 2000 (Photo by Nati Shohat / Flash90)

text.headline: The Second Lebanon War
text.text: An Israeli mobile artillery unit fires towards southern Lebanon near the Israel-Lebanon border on Wednesday July 12, 2006. (Photo by Pierre Terdjman / Flash90)

text.headline: Operation Cast Lead
text.text: Palestinians clean the rubble of a house that was destroyed early on December 29, 2008 following an Israeli air strike on the town of Rafah in the southern Gaza Strip. (Photo by Pierre Terdjman / Flash90)

text.headline: The Mavi Marmara Flotilla Raid
text.text: Footage taken from the Mavi Marmara security cameras on May 31, 2010 showing activists preparing for the raid by Israeli marines. (Photo by IDF Spokesperson / Flash90

text.headline: Operation Pillar of Defense
text.text: Rockets fired from the Gaza Strip are intercepted by the Iron Dome system near the Israeli town of Sderot on November 20, 2012. (Photo by Mendy Hechtman / Flash90

text.headline: Operation Protective Edge
text.text: Palestinians stand in a desroyed house in the Al Shejaeiya neighbourhood of Gaza City on 28 August 2014 (Photo by Emad Nassar / Flash90)
